hero.title: Welcome to Crowdpurr
hero.subtitle: Ready to check it out?
hero.ctaText: Get started right now with our free plan, no payment required.

features.title: Create, Configure and Run Your Event
features.description: Create, configure and run your interactive event from anywhere using the web-based dashboard.

features.title: Playback Options
features.description: Manually control every step of your event. Or allow participants to interact at their own pace.

features.title: Analyze Results
features.description: Review all participant responses and rankings then export your entire event to a spreadsheet.

secondarySection.title: Book a Free Demo
secondarySection.description: Want to discuss it? Book a free demo to review your specific use-case.

footer: Crowdpurr – Fun and engaging interactive event experiences.
